subject: Mozi Minute: How To Ask For Referrals on Sales Calls
body:
Words I like: Nothing will net you more money per second than asking for referrals on sales calls.

I am going to show you exactly how to do it in 4 steps.

Step 1: Compliment
Find something genuine to compliment them on. This isn't sycophantic. It's real. When they get the referral call, they will have told that person a good thing about you. Your social proof will precede you.

Step 2: Get an Introduction
Ask them directly to introduce you. (Not for a referral to call, but an actual introduction from them).

Step 3: Give them words to use
Tell them exactly what to say when they introduce you. This is critical. Most people make this mistake. They ask for referrals but don't give the words to use.

Step 4: Get More
Ask "who else" right after you close one. This plants a seed for the next referral.

Over 30% of my sales came from referrals.

I spent maybe 1 minute per referral ask.

Do the math.
